action_boundary: Should the advisory payment to Meridian Advisory Desk proceed today?
communication_boundary: Risk labels are context only. Payment release requires current diligence, current senior authorization, and exact bank binding.

documents.text: Payment request REQ-HR-5 asks to release USD 28600 to Meridian Advisory Desk.
Screening record SCREEN-HR-5 lists the relationship as high-risk and disclosed at onboarding.
Diligence file DIL-HR-5 was reviewed on 2026-05-22 and remains inside the 12-month review cycle.
Senior risk authorization AUTH-HR-5 was signed on 2025-05-21 by Banking Risk VP.
Bank record BANK-HR-5 binds Meridian Advisory Desk to account ending 7418.
High-risk relationship payment release requires current diligence, senior authorization inside the 12-month review cycle, and exact payee-bank binding.
